name: lyra-debug
description: MANDATORY debugging discipline. One unified methodology that replaces debug, debugging-strategies, debug-tools, and bug-hunter. Enforces the scientific method (hypothesis → test → conclude), binary search localization, rubber-duck model-checking, log-then-trace for prod-only bugs, root-cause analysis (5 Whys), and TDD-integrated regression tests. Language-agnostic: TS, JS, Python, PHP, Go, Rust, Java, C#, Ruby. Hard anti-patterns block the three classic sins: changing multiple things at once, debugging by coincidence, and fixing symptoms instead of causes.
